iteration_2.description: Stability confirmation run with same skill

iteration_3.description: Optimized concise skill — same scores, 39% cost reduction

max_achievable_scores.explanation: Three criteria (output-exists on both tasks, admission-count, discharge-count) have testPattern values that don't match JUnit test case names, causing them to always score 0 regardless of model output. The model produces correct output for all criteria — the 40pt loss on medication-reconciliation and 10pt loss on note-extraction are due to evaluation harness pattern-matching bugs.

changes_made: Reduced SKILL.md from 269 lines to ~75 lines (72% reduction)
Removed verbose Python implementation algorithm (model doesn't need pseudocode)
Removed ICD-10 code references (not needed for extraction)
Removed top-20 drug list (model has this knowledge intrinsically)
Removed regex patterns (model writes its own or does manual extraction)
Condensed output format examples to single-line JSON
Kept critical elements: entity types, output schemas, negation rules, medication reconciliation format, drug class groupings
